An '''unidentified [[Skiff guard/Legends|skiff guard]]''' worked on [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] sail barge in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and told [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] of how his sister [[Shaara]] evaded being eaten by the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]]. The son of [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmers]], he also had a brother named [[Kamma]].

{{Char-stub}}
